title: Replay window size: Python 32 vs Rust/C 64 (spec 02 says 32, draft-01 says minimum 64)
description: Python replay.py:34 WINDOW_SIZE=32 (test asserts the constant stays 32); Rust replay.rs:30-44 and C replay.h:55-59 use 64-slot bitmaps. spec/02-physical-link.md 4.4 receiver state says 32-bit bitmap; draft-lichen-link-01:221-222 says minimum 64, SHOULD be 128. Python follows the old spec and is below the new draft's MUST-minimum. At reorder depths 33-64 Python drops frames Rust/C accept. Fix: pick 64 (draft), update Python + spec 02.
